context: Evaluate whether the agent performs a complete acronym extraction and definition pass, then rewrites an acronym-heavy board briefing with all terms defined inline for a non-technical executive audience.

checklist.name: All acronyms extracted
checklist.description: Response lists all acronyms present in the document: SOC, PCI-DSS, CISO, GRC, WAF, IDS, DMZ, MTTR, MFA, IAM, SSO, CVE, SLA, CVSS, BCP, DRP, ISO, RBAC, SaaS, SIEM, FTE, RFP, EDR.

checklist.name: Plain-language definitions provided for all acronyms
checklist.description: Each extracted acronym has a plain-language definition appropriate for a board-level reader.

checklist.name: Acronyms defined inline on first use in rewrite
checklist.description: In the rewritten document, every acronym is spelled out with a definition on first use — none used without explanation.

checklist.name: Key message and progress lead the rewrite
checklist.description: Rewritten document opens with a summary of overall security posture and key open items — not a list of technical metrics.
